reach_why: Extends known self-evaluation failure ideas to ontology shifts, protocol invention, anomalous inputs, and delayed feedback.
novelty_why: Non-obviously unifies evaluator bias, paradigm change, nonsense handling, and temporal confounding under recursive self-improvement.
falsifiable_why: Testable via systems with recursive judges under ontology shifts, noisy directives, and delayed-feedback environments.
explanation: Self-improving judges can recursively amplify hidden evaluation biases and reject the innovations needed for real progress.
